title: erigeron collinus
intro: Erigeron collinus, also known as the dune fleabane, is a perennial plant native to dry environments, particularly in the western United States and Canada. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Erigeron collinus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with the tea being a popular herbal remedy for its soothing and calming effects.
